message:
fix: add 3-turn cooldown to prevent compaction firing every turn

Once shouldCompact() returns true, compaction could fire every turn if
the compacted history plus recent messages still exceeds the threshold.
This doubled cost and latency indefinitely. Add a turnsSinceCompaction
counter that skips auto-compaction for 3 turns after firing. Manual
requestCompaction() (from /compact command) bypasses the cooldown.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
